ham.subject: Bank Alert: Recent Transaction on Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a recent transaction of INR 5,000 on your account ending with 1234, dated 15-Apr-2026. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our support immediately.

Thank you,
Your Bank Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Claim Your University Scholarship Now!
spam.body:
Dear Student,

Congratulations! You have been selected for a full scholarship of INR 1,50,000 from the National Institute of Higher Education. To finalize your scholarship, we need you to verify your personal details and submit the required documents.

Please click <URL> to access the verification portal. The deadline to complete this process is 30 days from today. Failure to act may result in forfeiture of the scholarship.

Best regards,
Scholarship Office
National Institute of Higher Education
